name: punchwall-rebirth-boss
description: Validate rebirth requirements, rebirth reset, Titan gate, and Titan reward.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("Reset"))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { WallLevel = 55, Coins = 1000000, Power = 250000, Rebirths = 0, FistMultiplier = 45, EquippedFist = "Titan Gauntlet" })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("Rebirth"))

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("SetStats", { WallLevel = 99, Depth = 75, Coins = 0, Power = 400000000, FistMultiplier = 2, PetMultiplier = 0 })
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("HitBoss"))
